tests.scenario: User accesses the relaxation content library and selects a meditation session
steps: Launch the application and navigate to the relaxation content library
Verify that a variety of content types, including meditation sessions and calming sounds, are available
Select a meditation session and play it
tests.expected_result: The selected meditation session plays without interruption, and the user can easily access and play other types of relaxation content

steps: Launch the meditation application and navigate to the meditation settings
Select a duration of 10 minutes, a guided meditation type, and a nature sound
Adjust the volume to a comfortable level
tests.expected_result: The system starts a 10-minute guided meditation with nature sounds at the selected volume

tests.scenario: Validate sleep mode transition from meditation session to silent mode
steps: Start a meditation session with calming sounds
Activate the sleep mode feature
Verify that the system gradually transitions the meditation session to silent mode over a predefined period
tests.expected_result: The system successfully transitions the user from the meditation session to a silent mode, helping them fall asleep

tests.scenario: Access to free content sources without paywalls or subscriptions
steps: Launch the application and navigate to the content sources section
Verify that a list of free content sources is displayed
Access a content source that typically requires a paywall or subscription
tests.expected_result: The content from the selected source is accessible without prompting for payment or subscription

steps: Navigate to the content sources catalog
Browse through a list of content sources
Check the access indicators for each content source
tests.expected_result: Content sources are clearly labeled as 'Free', 'Free Trial', or 'Subscription required' to indicate access type

tests.scenario: Free trial expiration alert and auto-cancel subscription
steps: Set up a user account with a free trial subscription that expires in 1 day
Simulate the system sending an alert to the user about the impending free trial expiration
Do not confirm continuation of subscription within the specified timeframe
tests.expected_result: The system automatically cancels the user's subscription and notifies them of the cancellation

tests.scenario: User accesses and plays a guided meditation session
steps: Launch the application and navigate to the meditation library
Select a meditation session with a specific topic and length
Play the meditation session and verify it starts correctly
tests.expected_result: The user can access and play a guided meditation session with the selected topic and length, and the session starts playing without errors.

tests.scenario: Track user sleep patterns and provide insights on meditation's effect on sleep quality
steps: Create a user account and set up sleep tracking and meditation logging features
Simulate user sleep patterns and meditation sessions for a period of 7 days
Generate a report on the user's sleep quality and meditation insights
tests.expected_result: The system displays a report showing the user's sleep patterns, meditation frequency, and a correlation analysis of how meditation affects their sleep quality over time

tests.scenario: Customizable meditation reminders and sleep schedule functionality
steps: Log in to the system and navigate to the meditation reminders and sleep schedule settings
Set a customizable meditation reminder for a specific time of the day
Set a sleep schedule with a preferred bedtime and wake-up time
tests.expected_result: The system sends a meditation reminder at the set time and tracks the user's sleep schedule, providing a consistent relaxation and sleep routine

tests.scenario: User accesses the meditation library and retrieves sessions of varying lengths and topics
steps: Launch the application and navigate to the meditation library section
Verify that the library contains sessions of different lengths (e.g., 5, 10, 20 minutes)
Verify that the library contains sessions on various topics (e.g., stress, sleep, focus)
tests.expected_result: The user can browse and select meditation sessions of different lengths and topics, and the sessions are playable

steps: Launch the meditation application and navigate to the sound selection menu
Select a nature sound (e.g. rain) and play it in the background during a meditation session
Verify that the sound can also be played independently outside of a meditation session
tests.expected_result: The system plays the selected soothing sound (nature or white noise) correctly in the background during meditation and independently for relaxation, with no distortion or interruptions.

tests.scenario: Create and save a custom meditation session with guided meditation and soothing sounds
steps: Log in to the system as a valid user
Navigate to the meditation session creation page
Select a guided meditation and a soothing sound, then save the custom session
Verify that the custom session is listed in the user's saved sessions
tests.expected_result: The system allows the user to successfully create and save a custom meditation session combining their preferred guided meditation with soothing sounds, and the session is accessible in their saved sessions list.

steps: Log in to the system as an active subscriber
Navigate to the subscription management section
Click on the cancellation option and confirm cancellation
tests.expected_result: The system confirms the subscription has been cancelled and displays a confirmation message

tests.scenario: Automated refund process for subscribers who request it within the specified timeframe after canceling their subscription
steps: Subscriber cancels their subscription and requests a refund within the specified timeframe
System verifies the subscription cancellation and refund request
System processes the refund and sends a confirmation to the subscriber
tests.expected_result: The subscriber receives a refund within the specified timeframe, and the system sends a refund confirmation

steps: Subscriber logs into their account with an active subscription
Involuntary charge is triggered on the subscriber's account
Subscriber receives automated notification before the charge is processed
tests.expected_result: Subscriber receives a notification with details of the impending involuntary charge, including amount and reason, before the charge is made to their account.
